scripts.check: node --check api/winner-feed.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const s=fs.readFileSync('hapogea-preview/index.html','utf8'); const start=s.indexOf('<script>'); const end=s.lastIndexOf('</script>'); const js=start>=0&&end>start?s.slice(start+8,end):''; if (js) new Function(js); console.log('preview js ok')"
